name: rorebai
chineseName: 芯佰微电子(北京)有限公司
tagline: High-Performance Analog and Mixed-Signal IC Solutions
description: Rorebai (Corebai) is a leading Chinese analog semiconductor company specializing in high-speed data converters, RF transceivers, precision operational amplifiers, and power management ICs. The company focuses on providing high-reliability, high-performance domestic chip solutions for industrial control, communications, automotive electronics, and medical applications.
longDescription: Rorebai Microelectronics (Beijing) Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise and technology-oriented SME specializing in analog integrated circuits. The company focuses on core product lines including high-speed ADCs and DACs, RF chips, precision operational amplifiers, and power management ICs. Rorebai's products are widely used in industrial control, communications, automotive electronics, and medical equipment, providing customers with high-reliability and high-performance domestic chip solutions. The company has established strategic partnerships with multiple world-renowned foundries and packaging test facilities, ensuring product capacity and quality while maximizing customer benefits. With the philosophy of 'technology-oriented, quality first', Rorebai continues to increase R&D investment and accelerate product innovation to support industrial chain autonomy and control.

coreProducts.name: High-Speed Data Converters
coreProducts.description: High-speed ADCs and DACs with sampling rates up to GSPS, featuring high resolution and low power consumption for communication and instrumentation applications

coreProducts.name: RF Transceivers
coreProducts.description: RF transceiver chips including wideband RF PLLs, transmitters, and receivers for 4G/5G base stations and wireless communication systems

coreProducts.name: Precision Operational Amplifiers
coreProducts.description: High-precision op-amps with low offset, low noise, and wide bandwidth for signal conditioning and sensor interface applications

coreProducts.name: Power Management ICs
coreProducts.description: Power management solutions including voltage regulators, DC-DC converters, and power monitors for portable and industrial applications

industries.name: Industrial Control
industries.description: Precision measurement, process control, and automation systems requiring high-accuracy analog signal processing

industries.name: Communications
industries.description: 4G/5G base stations, wireless infrastructure, and broadband communication systems

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: ADAS, infotainment, body electronics, and powertrain control systems

industries.name: Medical Equipment
industries.description: Diagnostic imaging, patient monitoring, and medical instrumentation requiring high precision and reliability

industries.name: Test and Measurement
industries.description: Oscilloscopes, spectrum analyzers, and precision test equipment

certifications.name: National High-Tech Enterprise
certifications.description: Certification for high-technology enterprises in China

certifications.name: Technology-oriented SME
certifications.description: Certification for technology-oriented small and medium enterprises

seoTitle: Rorebai Distributor | Data Converters, RF & Analog ICs | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized Rorebai distributor offering high-speed ADCs/DACs, RF transceivers, precision op-amps, and power management ICs. Technical support available.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Rorebai products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of Rorebai (Corebai Microelectronics). As an authorized partner, we provide genuine Rorebai products with full technical support, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain services. We have direct access to Rorebai's engineering resources and can support your design-in requirements from concept to production. Our partnership covers Rorebai's complete analog IC portfolio including high-speed data converters, RF transceivers, precision op-amps, and power management ICs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Purchase Rorebai products from LiTong with confidence knowing you are getting genuine components with full warranty and technical support.

faqs.question: What are Rorebai's core product categories?
faqs.answer: Rorebai specializes in four main product categories: (1) High-Speed Data Converters - ADCs and DACs with sampling rates up to GSPS, featuring high resolution and low power consumption; (2) RF Transceivers - wideband RF PLLs, transmitters, and receivers for 4G/5G base stations and wireless communication; (3) Precision Operational Amplifiers - high-precision op-amps with low offset, low noise, and wide bandwidth; (4) Power Management ICs - voltage regulators, DC-DC converters, and power monitors for various applications. Each category includes multiple series optimized for specific performance requirements and operating environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team to discuss which Rorebai product category best fits your application requirements.

faqs.question: What makes Rorebai different from other analog IC suppliers?
faqs.answer: Rorebai differentiates itself through several key advantages: (1) Domestic innovation - Chinese company focused on autonomous and controllable analog IC technology; (2) High-performance products - competitive specifications compared to international brands; (3) Strategic partnerships - collaboration with world-renowned foundries and packaging facilities ensuring quality and capacity; (4) Focus on key applications - specialized solutions for industrial, communications, automotive, and medical markets; (5) Rapid development - founded in 2020 but already recognized as an excellent domestic brand; (6) Local support - strong technical support presence in China with fast response times. Rorebai's commitment to 'technology-oriented, quality first' drives continuous innovation in analog IC design.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Rorebai for high-performance domestic analog IC solutions with strong local support.

faqs.question: Does Rorebai offer automotive-grade products?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rorebai offers products suitable for automotive applications including high-reliability data converters, precision amplifiers, and power management ICs. Their products feature high reliability, low power consumption, and wide temperature range operation suitable for automotive environments. Rorebai's automotive portfolio supports applications such as ADAS sensor interfaces, battery management systems, infotainment systems, and body electronics. The company's strategic partnerships with major foundries ensure consistent quality and supply for automotive production requirements. Contact LiTong for specific automotive product recommendations and qualification support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for Rorebai automotive product selection and technical documentation.

faqs.question: What applications are Rorebai products best suited for?
faqs.answer: Rorebai products are optimized for high-performance analog applications including: (1) Industrial Control - precision measurement, process control, and automation systems; (2) Communications - 4G/5G base stations, wireless infrastructure, and broadband systems; (3) Automotive Electronics - ADAS, infotainment, body electronics, and powertrain control; (4) Medical Equipment - diagnostic imaging, patient monitoring, and medical instrumentation; (5) Test and Measurement - oscilloscopes, spectrum analyzers, and precision test equipment. Rorebai's focus on these demanding markets ensures their products meet stringent requirements for accuracy, reliability, and performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Share your application requirements with LiTong FAE team for personalized Rorebai product recommendations.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Rorebai products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Rorebai products including: (1) Product selection guidance - helping you choose the right Rorebai components for your application; (2) Application engineering - supporting schematic design, PCB layout, and system integration; (3) Reference designs - providing proven design examples and evaluation boards; (4) Quality support - handling RMA processes and quality issues; (5) Design-in support - providing technical documentation and application notes; (6) Long-term supply - ensuring stable supply for production programs. Our FAE team has expertise in analog IC applications across industrial, communications, automotive, and medical markets.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong FAE team for comprehensive technical support on Rorebai products.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Rorebai products?
faqs.answer: Rorebai product lead times vary by product type and order volume: (1) Standard products - typically 4-6 weeks for common parts; (2) High-volume orders - may require 6-8 weeks depending on capacity; (3) New products - first samples may take 8-12 weeks; (4) Custom requirements - contact LiTong for specific scheduling. LiTong maintains strategic inventory for high-demand Rorebai products to support urgent requirements. For critical projects, we recommend forecasting and buffer stock arrangements. Contact LiTong sales for specific lead time information and scheduling.
faqs.decisionGuide: Standard products 4-6 weeks, special products 6-8 weeks. Contact LiTong sales for specific lead times.
